raw_consumer_statement:
I have gone through filing Missouri AG complaints, FTC complaints, a XXXX XXXX XXXX Fraud Complain Form to obtain a police report, as well as, making multiple phone calls, sending multiple faxes, emailing multiple letters and physically mailing multiple letters. 
I experienced fraud on my credit account, which I reported when I identified it through the above various methods. The company determined it was not fraud, but has provided me no evidence or explanation. Every time I try to re-open the case, Im told I need to provide new evidence, but no one can tell me outside of what Ive already provided what I need to provide.
